## Checklist
- [ ] Linked issue has acceptance criteria and I have met them
- [ ] Python: `ruff check . && ruff format .` passes locally
- [ ] Node.js: `pnpm lint && pnpm format:check` passes locally (if touching gateway-api)
- [ ] `pytest packages/` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes locally (if touching gateway-api)
- [ ] New tests added for new code
- [ ] Docs updated if public behaviour changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or internal strategy docs committed
- [ ] Security impact reviewed (no new attack surface introduced)
- [ ] Docker Compose builds if service files changed
